sections.paragraph:
Original: אפיק אפק

Transliteration: 'ăphêq 'ăphı̂yq

Phonetic: af-ake'

BDB Definition:

Aphek or Aphik = "enclosure"
  1. a Canaanite city near Jezreel
  2. a city in territory of Asher
  3. a city northeast of Beirut in Transjordan

Origin: from H662 (in the sense of strength)

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
